'''chajala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avertissement|avertissement]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-j-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avertissement|avertissement]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chajala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæjælæth|chæjælæth]] || [[word:chæjælæj|chæjælæj]] || [[word:chæjælæsh|chæjælæsh]] || [[word:chæjælæ|chæjælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chajajalath|chajajalath]] || [[word:chajajalaj|chajajalaj]] || [[word:chajajalash|chajajalash]] || [[word:chajajala|chajajala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chajalath|chajalath]] || [[word:chajalaj|chajalaj]] || [[word:chajalash|chajalash]] || [[word:chajala|chajala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chajaflath|chajaflath]] || [[word:chajaflaj|chajaflaj]] || [[word:chajaflash|chajaflash]] || [[word:chajaflaf|chajaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chajalatha|chajalatha]] || [[word:chajalaja|chajalaja]] || [[word:chajalasha|chajalasha]] || [[word:chajalaka|chajalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chajalath|chajalath]] || [[word:chajalaj|chajalaj]] || [[word:chajalash|chajalash]] || [[word:chajala|chajala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chajalathal|chajalathal]] || [[word:chajalajal|chajalajal]] || [[word:chajalashal|chajalashal]] || [[word:chajalakal|chajalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chajalathatha|chajalathatha]] || [[word:chajalajaja|chajalajaja]] || [[word:chajalashasha|chajalashasha]] || [[word:chajalaka|chajalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chajalathan|chajalathan]] || [[word:chajalajan|chajalajan]] || [[word:chajalashan|chajalashan]] || [[word:chajalakan|chajalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chajalathaoro|chajalathaoro]] || [[word:chajalajaoro|chajalajaoro]] || [[word:chajalashaoro|chajalashaoro]] || [[word:chajalakaoro|chajalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
